name: contact-card
prompt: Ultra-minimal contact card design. White background. Center-aligned text stack: "Let's Build Together" in charcoal (#1c1c1d), medium size. Below, smaller grey text: "mark@example.com". Below that, three tiny grey links separated by vertical bars: "GitHub | LinkedIn | Resume". One element (email) underlined with thin ember orange (#D95B43) line. No icons, no buttons, pure text. Lots of white space around. Inter font.
